Compliance.title: Compliance
Compliance.description: Risks arising from non-compliance with relevant data security laws and regulations issued by national regulatory authorities, functional departments and organizations

Norms.title: Norms
Norms.description: Risks arising from non-compliance with relevant data security norms that should be possessed and observed, excluding 'Compliance'

Functional.title: Functional
Functional.description: A category of risks caused by functional bugs in the implementation process of data systems

Weakness.title: Weakness
Weakness.description: Risks that will not be directly exploited by attackers, but may cause problems when combined with certain vulnerabilities or in certain specific scenarios

Vulnerability.title: Vulnerability
Vulnerability.description: Risks that may be discovered and exploited by attackers to cause certain data security impacts

Confrontational.title: Confrontational
Confrontational.description: A category of risks that have a certain confrontational stage and require continuous capability improvement

AIRisk.title: AI Security
AIRisk.description: Data security risks arising from the introduction of artificial intelligence, large language models (LLM), machine learning and other technologies, including model attacks, training data security, AI system data leakage, etc.
